programmes.show_description: 1/6. Conor and Jock get roped into an amateur heist masterminded by Billy Murphy, but drafting in baby Star causes chaos. Contains strong language.
2/6. Sgt Healy finally corners the lads, so they enlist the help of exasperated Mairead. Contains strong language.
3/6. Mairead books the lads a behaviour therapy session in Dublin, so a road trip is arranged. Contains strong language.
4/6. Conor and Jock are hoping to make the school debs a special night for the girls, but they're destined to create chaos despite themselves. Contains very strong language.
5/6. Jock gets caught up in a row with a local tearaway, leading to a challenge to a boxing match, which Jock reluctantly agrees to. Contains very strong language.
6/6. Conor and Jock decide it's time to move out of home to Spain, to Mairead's amusement. But an incident with Billy Murphy distracts them from their plan. Contains strong language.

programmes.show_name: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programmes.show_description: 10/10. Tommy receives some terrible news that reminds him to live life to its fullest. Will he manage the biggest physical challenge yet? Contains strong language.
Programmes start at 7.00pm.

Indonesia. Wildlife series. Steve Backshall travels to Indonesia in search of three very different reptiles to add to his list of 60 deadly predators.

1/6. Conor and Jock have grown older, but not necessarily any wiser. Contains strong language.
2/6. Conor decides to do his Leaving Cert exam, placing a bet with his arch-enemy Gavin. Contains strong language and adult humour.
3/6. Mairéad tells Healy and Conor to take a fishing trip to see Healy's estranged father. Contains strong language.
4/6. There's a new Fake Billy Murphy in town, and he steals Conor's most prized possession - the engraved lighter given to him by his best friend Jock. Contains strong language.
5/6. Mairead unexpectedly hosts Star's birthday party, and Conor helps Jock join it remotely. Contains strong language.
6/6. Jock tries to talk to Star, and Mairéad has to reveal her secret. Contains strong language.
